scripts.render:dashboard: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardWalkthrough out/dashboard.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p && remotion render src/index.ts DashboardWalkthrough out/dashboard.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.render:overview: remotion render src/index.ts OverviewWalkthrough out/overview.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p && remotion render src/index.ts OverviewWalkthrough out/overview.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.render:expenses: remotion render src/index.ts ExpensesWalkthrough out/expenses.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p && remotion render src/index.ts ExpensesWalkthrough out/expenses.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.render:budgets: remotion render src/index.ts BudgetsWalkthrough out/budgets.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p && remotion render src/index.ts BudgetsWalkthrough out/budgets.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.render:fixed-expenses: remotion render src/index.ts FixedExpensesWalkthrough out/fixed-expenses.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p && remotion render src/index.ts FixedExpensesWalkthrough out/fixed-expenses.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.render:workspaces: remotion render src/index.ts WorkspacesWalkthrough out/workspaces.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p && remotion render src/index.ts WorkspacesWalkthrough out/workspaces.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.render:all: npm run render:dashboard && npm run render:overview && npm run render:expenses && npm run render:budgets && npm run render:fixed-expenses && npm run render:workspaces
